news:news.news:title: A magnitude 7.4 earthquake struck off Indonesia, while Israel escalates attacks in Lebanon amidst ongoing geopolitical tensions.
news:news.news:keywords: geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, impact of natural disasters, political developments in the US, Italy's World Cup failure, crime and safety in South Africa

news:news.news:title: SpaceX confidentially files for a public offering, while oil prices drop and markets rally amid geopolitical tensions.
news:news.news:keywords: SpaceX IPO news, Oil prices and market reactions, Oracle job cuts and AI investment, US fuel price trends, Washington millionaire tax implications

news:news.news:title: NASA successfully launched the Artemis II mission, marking a significant step toward returning humans to the Moon.
news:news.news:keywords: NASA Artemis II mission launch, legal issues with Moon base project, Apple iPhone anniversary, Kia EV3 electric SUV announcement, April Fools' Day tech pranks

news:news.news:title: Puka Nacua enters rehab amid legal issues, while Tiger Woods receives permission to seek treatment abroad and the NCAA considers new eligibility rules for athletes.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA eligibility changes, Tiger Woods treatment, Puka Nacua rehab news, Celtics scoring record, World Cup ticket prices

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries range from microbial insights in colon cancer to the evolutionary history of squid, highlighting diverse advancements in understanding health and biology.
news:news.news:keywords: microbial fingerprints in cancer treatment, new species discovery in rainforest, effects of caffeine on behavior, evolutionary history of squid, impact of deep sleep on health

news:news.news:title: Iran is reportedly using children in security roles amid ongoing conflicts, raising serious humanitarian concerns.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East conflict updates, Iran child security roles, Lebanon peacekeeper casualties, India census 2026, Chiang Mai air pollution health risks

news:news.news:title: US average fuel prices exceed $4 per gallon for the first time in four years amid ongoing conflict in Iran, impacting markets and consumer sentiment.
news:news.news:keywords: US fuel prices and market impact, Iran conflict and economic implications, Federal funding for public broadcasting, Millionaire tax in Washington state, OpenAI profitability and IPO prospects

news:news.news:title: Amazon's Big Spring Sale offers significant discounts on various tech products, while new AI developments continue to emerge in the technology sector.
news:news.news:keywords: Amazon Big Spring Sale discounts, AI advancements in technology, smart home devices deals

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods is stepping away from golf to seek treatment following his recent arrest, while the U.S. soccer team struggles with a loss to Portugal.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods treatment announcement, USMNT soccer loss to Portugal, NFL Rooney Rule support, Italy World Cup elimination, Ovechkin's record-breaking season

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal new insights into asteroids, blood pressure management, evolutionary biology, and the behavior of materials, highlighting ongoing advancements in various fields.
news:news.news:keywords: asteroid chemistry, blood pressure management, squid evolution, deep sleep benefits, non-drug arthritis therapies

news:news.news:title: SpaceX Confidentially Files for IPO as Israel's Military Actions Escalate Tensions in Lebanon
Iran Employs Child Soldiers as US Fuel Prices Top $4 for First Time in Four Years
